problem.title: Final Problem 3
problem.description: This is the third of the final problems to reach our target of 251 problems.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Hash Set [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: This solution uses a hash set to detect the first duplicate element in an array in a single pass. Each element is checked against the set before insertion; if it already exists, that element is the first duplicate. The key insight is that a hash set provides O(1) average-case lookup, giving an overall O(n) solution with O(n) space.
